# comfyui_free_u (Resource)

ComfyUI FreeU node [model_patches/unet]



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `b1` (Number) Input: FLOAT default: 1.1
- `b2` (Number) Input: FLOAT default: 1.2
